NGYCP

February 26, 2004

websitemilitaryportals

National Guard ChalleNGe Program (NGYCP) "A Better America One Youth At A Time". NGYCP is a structured, quasi-military training and mentoring program for at-risk youth that develops the life skills, educational levels and employment potential of 16-18 year old high-school drop-outs.

www.ngycp.org
